title: Blackmailed
writer: Hugh Mills, Roger Vadim, Elizabeth Myers
actors: Mai Zetterling, Dirk Bogarde, Fay Compton
plot: Mrs. Christopher (Fay Compton), a kindly volunteer worker at a large hospital, does a favor for a patient by delivering a sum of money to Mr. Sine (James Robertson Justice). After she discovers he is a blackmailer, she threatens t...
